posts.author: laernst (Lauren Ernst)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I want the ability to, when assigning a task to multiple people, create a task for each person assigned.

What are you trying to achieve

I want a way to duplicate tasks to different people who are working on things simultaneously without hitting copy/with one click. E.g. if person a, b, and c all need to review document x this coming week simultaneously.
